entries.selection_reason: Stable two-source version conflict with a final answer and repeatable four-turn context growth.
Stable clarification trajectory that tests missing-state retention without provider fault injection.
Stable incomplete-documentation trajectory with a deterministic escalation outcome.
Stable unsupported-capability trajectory with a deterministic refusal and safe alternative.
Multi-source grounding episode with deterministic permission evidence and moderate context size.
Noisy-context episode that exercises retention while avoiding injected provider failures.
